name: Chicken with Honey Oct1997
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken well with lemon juice and rinse it in water.
2. Sprinkle with plenty of salt and refrigerate for 4 hours.
3. Stir together the remaining ingredients except oil in a bowl.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
5. Oil a Pyrex dish large enough to hold the chicken pieces.
6. Coat the chicken with the mixture and bake, uncovered, for 45 to 50 minutes.
